trans-unit.source: Copiar tareas de proyecto a varios Proyectos
trans-unit.note: Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Property Caption
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - NamedType Text001
Job Task 1000 does not exist.
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - NamedType Text003
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - NamedType Text004
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - NamedType Text005
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control Apply - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies that the dimensions will be copied to the new job task.
trans-unit.note: Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control CopyDimensions - Property ToolTip
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control CopyDimensions - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies that the quantities will be copied to the new job.
trans-unit.note: Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control CopyQuantity - Property ToolTip
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control CopyQuantity - Property Caption
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control Copy from - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the basis on which you want the planning lines to be copied. If, for example, you want the planning lines to reflect actual usage and invoicing of items, resources, and general ledger expenses on the job you copy from, then select Job Ledger Entries in this field.
trans-unit.note: Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control From Source - Property ToolTip
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control From Source - Property Caption
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control From Source - Property OptionCaption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date from which the report or batch job processes information.
trans-unit.note: Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control FromDate - Property ToolTip
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control FromDate - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the first job task number to be copied from. Only planning lines with a job task number equal to or higher than the number specified in this field will be included.
trans-unit.note: Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control FromJobTaskNo - Property ToolTip
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control FromJobTaskNo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies how to copy job ledger entries. Usage+Sale: All job ledger entries are copied. Entries of type Usage are copied to new planning lines of type Budget. Entries of type Sale are copied to new planning lines of type Billable. Usage: All job ledger entries of type Usage are copied to new planning lines of type Budget. Sale: All job ledger entries of type Sale are copied to new planning lines of type Billable.
trans-unit.note: Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control Ledger Entry Line Type - Property ToolTip
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control Ledger Entry Line Type - Property Caption
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control Ledger Entry Line Type - Property OptionCaption

trans-unit.source: Specifies how copy planning lines. Budget+Billable: All planning lines are copied. Budget: Only lines of type Budget or type Both Budget and Billable are copied. Billable: Only lines of type Billable or type Both Budget and Billable are copied.
trans-unit.note: Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control Planning Line Type - Property ToolTip
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control Planning Line Type - Property Caption
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control Planning Line Type - Property OptionCaption
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control SourceJobNo - Property ToolTip
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control SourceJobNo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date to which the report or batch job processes information.
trans-unit.note: Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control ToDate - Property ToolTip
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control ToDate - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the last job task number to be copied from. Only planning lines with a job task number equal to or lower than the number specified in this field will be included.
trans-unit.note: Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control ToJobTaskNo - Property ToolTip
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control ToJobTaskNo - Property Caption
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control Copy to - Property Caption
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control TargetJobNo - Property ToolTip
Page Copy Job Tasks Varios - Control TargetJobNo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Tipo Trabajo field.
trans-unit.note: Page LineasPartesWeb - Control Work Type Description - Property ToolTip
Page LineasPartesWeb - Action Control imputacion Recursos - Property Caption
Page LineasPartesWeb - Action Crear Diario proyectos - Property Caption

Page LineasPartesWeb - Action Create Invoice by TimeSheet - Method OnAction - NamedType Text001

Page LineasPartesWeb - Action EditarPagina - Property Caption
Page LineasPartesWeb - Action Marcar - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Las lineas que esten marcadas SI generaran Lineas en el Diario de Proyecto
trans-unit.note: Page LineasPartesWeb - Action Marcar Lineas para el Diario - Property ToolTip
Page LineasPartesWeb - Action Marcar Lineas para el Diario - Property Caption
Page LineasPartesWeb - Action Responsable - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Las lineas que esten desmarcada NO generaran Lineas en el Diario de Proyecto
trans-unit.note: Page LineasPartesWeb - Action Un Mark Selected al Diario - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Desmarcar Lineas para el Diario de Proyecto
trans-unit.note: Page LineasPartesWeb - Action Un Mark Selected al Diario - Property Caption
Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the entry number of the item ledger entry that this value entry is linked to.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Capacity Ledger Entry No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the cost of invoiced items.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Cost Amount (Actual) - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the cost of the items that have been invoiced, if you post in an additional reporting currency.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Cost Amount (Actual) (ACY) - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the expected cost of the items, which is calculated by multiplying the Cost per Unit by the Valued Quantity.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Cost Amount (Expected) - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the expected cost of the items in the additional reporting currency.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Cost Amount (Expected) (ACY) - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the non-inventoriable cost, that is an item charge assigned to an outbound entry.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Cost Amount (Non-Invtbl.) - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the non-inventoriable cost, that is an item charge assigned to an outbound entry in the additional reporting currency.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Cost Amount (Non-Invtbl.)(ACY) - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the amount that has been posted to the general ledger.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Cost Posted to G/L - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the amount that has been posted to the general ledger if you post in an additional reporting currency.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Cost Posted to G/L (ACY) - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date when the related document was created.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Document Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the document number of the entry.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Document No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Entry No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the expected cost amount that has been posted to the interim account in the general ledger.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Expected Cost Posted to G/L - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies how many units of the item are invoiced by the posting that the value entry line represents.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Invoiced Quantity - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the item charge number of the value entry.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Item Charge No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that this value entry is linked to.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Item Ledger Entry No. - Property ToolTip
Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Item Ledger Entry Quantity - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the type of item ledger entry that caused this value entry.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Item Ledger Entry Type - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the item that this value entry is linked to.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Item No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code for the location of the item that the entry is linked to.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Location Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the price of the item for a sales entry.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Sales Amount (Actual) - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the expected price of the item for a sales entry, which means that it has not been invoiced yet.
trans-unit.note: Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Control Sales Amount (Expected) - Property ToolTip
Page Movimientos Valor Editable - Action ActionName - Property Caption
Page PostValueEntry - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Item No. field.
trans-unit.note: Page PostValueEntry - Control Item No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Posting Date field.
trans-unit.note: Page PostValueEntry - Control Posting Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Value Entry No. field.
trans-unit.note: Page PostValueEntry - Control Value Entry No. - Property ToolTip
Page PostValueEntry - Action ActionName - Property Caption
Page Prueba - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Id field.
trans-unit.note: Page Prueba - Control Id - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Shift field.
trans-unit.note: Page Prueba - Control Shift - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the TLB field.
trans-unit.note: Page Prueba - Control TLB - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Work1 field.
trans-unit.note: Page Prueba - Control Work1 - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Work2 field.
trans-unit.note: Page Prueba - Control Work2 - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Work3 field.
trans-unit.note: Page Prueba - Control Work3 - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Work4 field.
trans-unit.note: Page Prueba - Control Work4 - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Work5 field.
trans-unit.note: Page Prueba - Control Work5 - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Work6 field.
trans-unit.note: Page Prueba - Control Work6 - Property ToolTip
Page Prueba - Action ActionName - Property Caption
Report Purchase - Order Servitec - Control Options - Property Caption
Report Sales - Invoice Servitec - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Texto Pie field.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension CompanyInfEx - Control Texto Pie - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the bank account code of the customer/vendor associated with this document.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension DocsinPOSubformServitec - Control Cust./Vendor Bank Acc. Code - Property ToolTip
PageExtension JobLedgerEntries - Control SourceCode - Property Caption
PageExtension JobLedgerEntries - Control SourceName - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Open the Copy Job Tasks page.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension JobList - Action Copy Job Tasks &from... - Property ToolTip
PageExtension JobList - Action Copy Job Tasks &from... - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the customer who pays for the job.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension JobList - Control Bill-to Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the entry number of the project planning line that the sales line is linked to.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension SalesOrderSubform - Control Job Contract Entry No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the related project. If you fill in this field and the Project Task No. field, then a project ledger entry will be posted together with the sales line.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension SalesOrderSubform - Control Job No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the related project task.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension SalesOrderSubform - Control Job Task No. - Property ToolTip
PageExtension WAPP TimeSheet Card - Action Crear Diario proyectos. - Property Caption
PageExtension WAPP TimeSheet Card - Action Crear Diario proyectos. - Method OnAction - NamedType Text001
PageExtension WAPP TimeSheet Lines - Action Mark Selected al Diario - Property Caption
PageExtension WAPP TimeSheet Lines - Action Un Mark Selected al Diario - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Llevar al Diario field.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension WAPP TimeSheet Lines - Control Llevar al Diario - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: El parte %1 de la linea %2 esta en el diario de proyecto, no se puede borrar
trans-unit.note: TableExtension WAPPTimeSheetsLine - Method OnDelete - NamedType lError

trans-unit.source: El parte %1 de la linea %2 esta facturado, no se puede borrar
trans-unit.note: TableExtension WAPPTimeSheetsLine - Method OnDelete - NamedType lError2

trans-unit.source: El parte %1 de la linea %2 esta en el diario de proyecto, no se puede añadir teniendo lineas en la misma fecha en el diario
trans-unit.note: TableExtension WAPPTimeSheetsLine - Method OnInsert - NamedType lError

trans-unit.source: El parte %1 de la linea %2 y fecha %3,esta facturado, no se puede insertar un nuevo registro con la misma fecha
trans-unit.note: TableExtension WAPPTimeSheetsLine - Method OnInsert - NamedType lError2

trans-unit.source: El parte %1 de la linea %2 esta en el diario de proyecto, no se puede modificar
trans-unit.note: TableExtension WAPPTimeSheetsLine - Method OnModify - NamedType lError

trans-unit.source: El parte %1 de la linea %2 esta facturado, no se puede modificar
